text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Ines Fujin's coworkers aren't especially
familiar with the world of racing, they're still
surprised to hear that she plans to compete in the
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But they've seen Ines Fujin working hard
first-hand, and this is her dream. Knowing full well
how much effort she puts in, they root for her
with all they have.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mejiro Ryan—the hope of her
prestigious family—finds herself the subject of
great expectations. It sounds like she's being
touted as the favorite to win the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While greatness is expected from both, Mejiro
Ryan has conflicting feelings when she sees just
how focused Ines Fujin is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, Mejiro Ryan plans to come and
observe the Asahi Hai F.S. Excited to learn that
her friend will be in attendance, Ines Fujin feels
massively motivated.
